curriculum_ref: KZ Grade 11 — Integrals / area of a curvilinear trapezoid
_comment: Becomes an assessments.Question tagged with the content.Tag below. A wider integration interval => harder, so difficulty scales `upper`.

a.desc: x^2 coefficient (mult. of 3 keeps result integer)

answer.desc: answer_key = F(upper) - F(lower) where F is the antiderivative

narrative_settings: civil engineering of a bridge arch in Astana
fuel consumption of a rocket over a time interval
water volume filling a curved reservoir
